diagrams.description: Special Education is the tailored instruction designed to meet the unique needs of students with disabilities. This flowchart illustrates the systematic process: the ultimate goal is to provide equitable access and individualized support in the least restrictive environment. It begins with referral and assessment, followed by eligibility determination and IEP development. Core components include specialized instruction, related services, accommodations, and assistive technology. These are implemented within inclusive settings and monitored for progress, leading to outcomes of academic achievement, independence, and social participation.
